title: Fetch failed error in N8nLlmTracing
symptom: The AI agent responds very slowly, and an error message 'TypeError: fetch failed' is displayed.
not_this_if: Using a proxy that implements all required methods
Network access to the proxy is stable
root_cause: The error occurs when the N8nLlmTracing component attempts to fetch data but fails due to network issues or an improperly configured proxy that does not support all necessary methods.
fix_steps: Remove the N8nLlmTracing implementation from the file
Save the changes and restart n8n
agent_instruction: Remove the N8nLlmTracing implementation from the specified file and restart n8n.
